ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
Vivian Lerche, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court orders this case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
